purpose: Bind a verified isolated Runner to exactly one Agent, Work Node, Grant, and task workspace.
invariants: A pending candidate is metadata only and cannot pass the Runner dispatch gate.
A verified attestation must be issued by a registered Runner or approved isolation provider; a manual switch is not evidence.
runner_id, agent_id, task_id, and grant_id are exact bindings, not descriptive labels.
The isolation root is inside the task-specific sandbox workspace and is not the host workspace root.
The attestation expires no later than the Grant and cannot outlive the Work Node execution window.
Verification rejects network, host mounts, file export, web, ERP, arbitrary MCP, and non-reference secrets.
Evidence hash is a reference to provider evidence; it is not a hash of a self-authored assertion.
